languages.text: "Дом Драйвстем поддерживает притязания наследницы фон Валанциус. Наша верность Золотому Трону и династии фон Валанциус непоколебима". {n}Старуха гордо распрямляет спину. На секунду кажется, будто она помолодела на несколько десятков лет.{/n}

languages.text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Дом Драйвстем поддерживает притязания наследницы фон Валанциус. Наша верность Золотому Трону и династии фон Валанциус непоколебима". {n}Старуха гордо распрямляет спину. На секунду кажется, будто она помолодела на несколько десятков лет.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

"House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

"House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

languages.text: “德莱夫斯塔家族支持冯·瓦兰修斯继承人的正当主张。我们对黄金王座与冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的忠诚，坚定不移。”{n}那老妇人挺直了腰背，神情骄傲。一瞬间，她仿佛年轻了几十岁。{/n}
languages.original_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “德莱夫斯塔家族支持冯·瓦兰修斯继承人的正当主张。我们对黄金王座与冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的忠诚，坚定不移。”{n}那老妇人挺直了腰背，神情骄傲。一瞬间，她仿佛年轻了几十岁。{/n}

languages.text: « La maison Drivestem soutient la revendication de l'héritière. Notre loyauté envers le Trône d'Or et la dynastie von Valancius est totale. » {n}La vieille femme se redresse fièrement. Pendant un instant, elle paraît rajeunir de plusieurs décennies.{/n}
languages.original_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « La maison Drivestem soutient la revendication de l'héritière. Notre loyauté envers le Trône d'Or et la dynastie von Valancius est totale. » {n}La vieille femme se redresse fièrement. Pendant un instant, elle paraît rajeunir de plusieurs décennies.{/n}

languages.text: «La casa Drivestem apoya la decisión de la heredera de von Valancius. Nuestra lealtad al Trono Dorado y a la dinastía von Valancius es inquebrantable». {n}La anciana se endereza, orgullosa, y por un momento parece rejuvenecer varias décadas.{/n}
languages.original_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La casa Drivestem apoya la decisión de la heredera de von Valancius. Nuestra lealtad al Trono Dorado y a la dinastía von Valancius es inquebrantable». {n}La anciana se endereza, orgullosa, y por un momento parece rejuvenecer varias décadas.{/n}

languages.text: "Drivestem Hanesi, von Valancius vârisinin iddiasını destekliyor. Altın Taht'a ve von Valancius hanedanlığına olan sadakatimiz sarsılmazdır." {n}Yaşlı kadın, sırtını gururla dikleştiriyor. Bir an için sanki onlarca yıl gençleşmiş gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Drivestem Hanesi, von Valancius vârisinin iddiasını destekliyor. Altın Taht'a ve von Valancius hanedanlığına olan sadakatimiz sarsılmazdır." {n}Yaşlı kadın, sırtını gururla dikleştiriyor. Bir an için sanki onlarca yıl gençleşmiş gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Haus Drivestem unterstützt den Anspruch der Erbin derer von Valancius. Unsere Loyalität gegenüber dem Goldenen Thron und der Dynastie derer von Valancius ist unerschütterlich." {n}Die alte Frau richtet sich stolz auf. Für einen kurzen Moment wirkt sie einige Jahrzehnte jünger.{/n}
languages.original_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Haus Drivestem unterstützt den Anspruch der Erbin derer von Valancius. Unsere Loyalität gegenüber dem Goldenen Thron und der Dynastie derer von Valancius ist unerschütterlich." {n}Die alte Frau richtet sich stolz auf. Für einen kurzen Moment wirkt sie einige Jahrzehnte jünger.{/n}

languages.text: 「ハウス・ドライブスチームはフォン・ヴァランキウス家の相続人の主張を支持します。黄金の王座とフォン・ヴァランキウス家の忠誠心は揺るぎません。」{n}老女は誇らしげに背筋を伸ばす。一瞬、彼女は数十年若くなったように見える。{/n}
languages.original_text: "House Drivestem supports the claim of the von Valancius heir. Our loyalty to the Golden Throne and the von Valancius dynasty is unwavering." {n}The old woman straightens her back proudly. For a second, it seems as if she is several decades younger.{/n}
